raw_consumer_statement:
On my XXXX XXXX Citi card statement there where XXXX charges for {$1000.00} and XXXX charges for {$2000.00} that I did not authorize. XXXX statement attached. I disputed these charges and they were subtracted from my XXXX statement. XXXX statement attached. 
XXXX of these charges were added back on my XXXX statement. I disputed these charges again but this time Citi card said they have received evidence that they chares were ligament. I once again disputed these charges. All I received from Citi card were the XXXX letters ( attached ) claiming " The merchant provided documentation confirming this is a valid charge. '' However, there was no detailed documentation provided. I once again disputed these charges. It has been approximately a month with no reply from Citi Card regarding these charges and they are still on my monthly statement plus interest because I have not paid these specific amounts. It just doesn't make since that all the other similar amounts were found to be fraudulent and these were not.
